## PR Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Clean Commit: `<emoji> <type>: <description>` or `<emoji> <type> (<scope>): <description>`
- [ ] PR title type/emoji is one of:
  - `📦 new`, `🔧 update`, `🗑️ remove`, `🔒 security`, `⚙️ setup`
  - `☕ chore`, `🧪 test`, `📖 docs`, `🚀 release`
- [ ] Target branch follows Clean Flow:
  - `feature/*`, `fix/*`, `docs/*`, `chore/*`, `test/*`, `refactor/*` -> `dev`
  - `dev` -> `main` only for release merges

<!-- What changed and why? -->
